versions.version_description: Better chord fluidity and intro is improved.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Intro]

[ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] 
[ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] 


[Verse 1]

[tab]           [ch]Ab[/ch]
You're the light, you're the night[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Eb[/ch]
You're the colour of my blood[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Fm[/ch]
You're the cure, you're the pain[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]Db[/ch]
You're the only thing I wanna touch[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Eb[/ch]                           [ch]Fm[/ch]
Never knew that it could mean so much, so much[/tab]

           
[Verse 2]

[tab]           [ch]Ab[/ch]
You're the fear, I don't care[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Eb[/ch]
'Cause I've never been so high[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Fm[/ch]
Follow me through the dark[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Db[/ch]
Let me take you past the satellites[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Eb[/ch]                            [ch]Fm[/ch]
You can see the world you brought to life, to life[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]   [ch]Ab[/ch]                         [ch]Cm[/ch]
So love me like you do, la-la-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                         [ch]Db[/ch]
Love me like you do, la-la-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]                          [ch]Fm[/ch]                  [ch]Eb[/ch]
Touch me like you do, ta-ta-touch me like you do[/tab]

What are you waiting for?


[Verse 3]

[tab]       [ch]Ab[/ch]
Fading in, fading out[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
On the edge of paradise[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Fm[/ch]                                             [ch]Db[/ch]
Every inch of your skin is a holy grail I've got to find[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Eb[/ch]                       [ch]Fm[/ch]
Only you can set my heart on fire, on fire[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]           [ch]Ab[/ch]                 [ch]Cm[/ch]
Yeah, I'll let you set the pace[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Fm[/ch]
'Cause I'm not thinking straight[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Db[/ch]                      [ch]Eb[/ch]                    [ch]Fm[/ch]
My head's spinning around, I can't see clear no more[/tab]

What are you waiting for?


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                         [ch]Cm[/ch]
Love me like you do, la-la-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                         [ch]Db[/ch]
Love me like you do, la-la-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]                         [ch]Fm[/ch]                   [ch]Eb[/ch]
Touch me like you do, ta-ta-touch me like you do[/tab]

What are you waiting for?

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                         [ch]Cm[/ch]
Love me like you do, la-la-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                         [ch]Db[/ch]
Love me like you do, la-la-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]                         [ch]Fm[/ch]                   [ch]Eb[/ch]
Touch me like you do, ta-ta-touch me like you do[/tab]

What are you waiting for?


[Instrumental]

[ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]     [ch]Ab[/ch]                [ch]Cm[/ch]
I'll let you set the pace[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Fm[/ch]
'Cause I'm not thinking straight[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Db[/ch]                       [ch]Eb[/ch]                   [ch]Fm[/ch]
My head's spinning around, I can't see clear no more[/tab]

What are you waiting for?


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                         [ch]Cm[/ch]
Love me like you do, la-la-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                         [ch]Db[/ch]
Love me like you do, la-la-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]                         [ch]Fm[/ch]                   [ch]Eb[/ch]
Touch me like you do, ta-ta-touch me like you do[/tab]

What are you waiting for?

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                         [ch]Cm[/ch]
Love me like you do, la-la-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                         [ch]Db[/ch]
Love me like you do, la-la-love me like you do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]                         [ch]Fm[/ch]                   [ch]Eb[/ch]
Touch me like you do, ta-ta-touch me like you do[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Ab[/ch]
What are you waiting for?[/tab]


[Outro]

[ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]Db[/ch]
